macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin and major altcoins rally as cooler inflation data lifts crypto sentiment
items.summary: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, and Dogecoin all rose more than 2.5% in a broad crypto rebound after cooler-than-expected inflation data eased fears of aggressive Federal Reserve tightening. Bitcoin also held above $63,000, while analysts pointed to a possible breakout if it clears nearby resistance.

items.title: Crypto liquidations top $303 million as traders get squeezed
items.summary: Coinglass data cited in market coverage showed 119,414 traders liquidated over the past 24 hours for a total of $303.20 million. The sharp move underscores how quickly leverage is being flushed out during the current volatility.

items.title: Spot Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs record net outflows
items.summary: Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw net outflows of $213.9 million in one trading session, while spot Ethereum ETFs posted $35.6 million in outflows. The figures suggest continued short-term caution among institutional investors despite the market rebound.

items.title: U.S. House debate over crypto tax bills deepens partisan divide
items.summary: House Democrats pushed back on Republican-backed crypto tax legislation that would exempt staking and mining rewards from reportable income upon receipt. The dispute raises the odds that the bills stall ahead of the midterm election cycle.

items.title: UK regulator proposes 10% crypto allocation limit for mutual funds
items.summary: The UK Financial Conduct Authority proposed a framework that would allow retail investment funds to allocate up to 10% of portfolios to cryptocurrencies. The move would expand regulated crypto exposure for retail investors if adopted.

items.title: Japan’s major banks plan joint stablecoin launch by 2027
items.summary: Japan’s three largest financial institutions said they plan to jointly issue stablecoins during the current fiscal year ending in March 2027. The project is one of the most notable traditional-finance blockchain developments in the latest 24 hours.

items.title: Morpho raises $175 million to accelerate global expansion
items.summary: Lending protocol Morpho reportedly raised $175 million at a $2 billion valuation, with backing from major crypto and traditional-finance investors. The funding supports broader growth in onchain lending infrastructure.

items.title: Ethena teams with Centrifuge for first tokenized real-world asset purchase
items.summary: Ethena selected Centrifuge to help buy tokenized real-world assets for the first time, using the tokenized Janus Henderson Anemoy AAA CLO ETF as an initial target. The move extends the stablecoin project deeper into tokenized credit markets.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
